---
# Account-audit exhibit. McGriff-style Sensorvault audit record: a
# numbered chronological log of account events (Account Created,
# LH Enabled, Location Reporting Enabled, Device Associated,
# Device Disassociated) for one Google account.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-account-audit.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is the audit record for the Google account associated
  with the device identified in the Step 3 production. The audit
  record documents the timestamps of Location History opt-in,
  Location Reporting enablement, and device association events.

exhibit-type: account-audit
exhibit-title: "Google LLC Audit Record"
account-id: "104871329500981"

exhibit-records:
  - timestamp: "2017-08-20 14:32:11 UTC"
    event: "Account Created"
    detail: "Subject Account created from IP 73.214.118.42."

  - timestamp: "2017-08-20 14:35:47 UTC"
    event: "Location History Setting Set"
    detail: "Default value of 'off' applied at account creation."

  - timestamp: "2018-07-09 04:09:23 UTC"
    event: "LH Enabled (Sensorvault)"
    detail: |
      User opted in to Location History. Sensorvault server recorded
      successful enablement. Opt-in occurred through a device-based
      consent flow.
    device-tag: "8174-2256-0431"

  - timestamp: "2018-07-09 04:09:23 UTC"
    event: "Location Reporting Enabled"
    detail: "Subsetting enabled for Samsung Galaxy S9+ (SM-G965U)."
    device-tag: "8174-2256-0431"

  - timestamp: "2019-11-04 18:21:08 UTC"
    event: "Device Associated"
    detail: "New device added to the account."
    device-tag: "5293-7104-8862"

  - timestamp: "2024-03-15 09:14:55 UTC"
    event: "Location Reporting Disabled"
    detail: "Subsetting toggled off for device tag 5293-7104-8862."
    device-tag: "5293-7104-8862"
---
